Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.compliance
NORSOK and Equinor compliance gates for process design results.
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization
 
neqsim.process.safety.rupture
Fire rupture screening for process piping segments.

    Class
    Description
    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult
    Result from a trapped-liquid fire rupture screening study.

    Description

    Governed input package for a blowdown pipe fire-rupture study.
    PipeFireRuptureDataSource.Builder
    Builder for PipeFireRuptureDataSource.
    PipeFireRuptureInput
    Input data for one blowdown pipe fire-rupture strain-rate calculation.
    PipeFireRuptureInput.Builder
    Builder for PipeFireRuptureInput.
    PipeFireRuptureMaterial
    Temperature-dependent material properties for blowdown pipe fire-rupture strain-rate studies.
    PipeFireRuptureResult
    Result from a blowdown pipe fire-rupture strain-rate study.
    PipeFireRuptureResult.Builder
    Builder used by PipeFireRuptureStudy.
    PipeFireRuptureResult.ReleaseEstimate
    Spreadsheet-style release estimate at rupture.
    PipeFireRuptureResult.Status
    Limiting status for the rupture calculation.
    PipeFireRuptureScenario
    Fire exposure definition for blowdown pipe fire-rupture heat-up calculations.
    PipeFireRuptureStandardsValidator
    Standards and evidence validator for pipe fire-rupture study handoffs.
    PipeFireRuptureStudy
    Blowdown pipe fire-rupture strain-rate study.
    PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder
    Builder for PipeFireRuptureStudy.
    PipeFireRuptureStudy.PipeState
    Current pipe dimensions after strain deformation.

    Versioned handoff package for pipe fire-rupture studies.
    PipeFireRuptureStudyHandoff.Builder
    Builder for PipeFireRuptureStudyHandoff.

    Orchestrates governed pipe fire-rupture studies from a data source package.
    PipeFireRuptureStudyRunner.Builder
    Builder for PipeFireRuptureStudyRunner.
    PipeFireRuptureUncertaintyRunner.CaseResult
    One uncertainty case result.

    Uncertainty summary for default perturbation cases.

    SafetyStudyReadiness.Severity

    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult
    Result from a trapped-liquid fire rupture screening study.
    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder
    Builder used by the study implementation.
    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.FailureMode
    Limiting outcome for the study.
    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy
    Transient trapped-liquid fire rupture screening study for blocked-in piping segments.
    TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder
    Builder for TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.
    VesselRuptureAnalyzer
    Thin-wall vessel rupture analyzer that tracks the von Mises wall stress against the temperature-derated allowable tensile strength of the material throughout a fire or blowdown transient.
    VesselRuptureAnalyzer.VesselRuptureResult
    Immutable-style container of vessel rupture analysis output.
